description: Extend the runner/control-plane wire contract with whole-run dispatch and result messages while preserving all existing story-level messages.

userStories.title: Add whole-run dispatch message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RunDispatchMsg for control-plane-to-runner whole-run execution. It must have exactly: t: 'dispatch_run'; runId: string; goal: string; workspaceId: string; parallel: number; timeoutSecs: number; and optional route?: DispatchRoute. Include it in ToRunner without changing existing message shapes.
acceptance: RunDispatchMsg is exported with the exact required and optional field types, including parallel: number
ToRunner accepts RunDispatchMsg and preserves all existing members

userStories.title: Add whole-run result message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RunResultMsg for runner-to-control whole-run completion. It must have exactly: t: 'run_result'; runId: string; success: boolean; durationSecs: number; optional storiesPassed?: number and storiesTotal?: number; and error: string | null. Include it in ToControl without changing existing message shapes.
acceptance: RunResultMsg is exported with the exact required and optional field types
ToControl accepts RunResultMsg and preserves all existing members

userStories.title: Document run-level protocol support
userStories.description: Update README.md so it clearly states that the protocol supports both story-level and whole-run dispatch/results, naming dispatch_run and run_result. Keep the documentation concise and consistent with the actual exported types.
acceptance: Documentation does not claim behavior outside the wire contract
